name: ROCKETEER

abilities.name: Abort Mission
abilities.text: After resolving an action that targeted and damaged this model, it may discard a card or remove an Assault marker within 2" to move up to 5".

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Sputtering Exhaust
abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is concealing terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

actions.name: Rocket Punch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Pilot Flame
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within ()(2)" of the target.

triggers.name: Clear Away
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target.

actions.name: Onward
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may declare the Walk action.

triggers.name: Booster Thrust
triggers.text: While resolving the generated action, increase this model's Sp by 4.

extraction_notes: Pilot Flame effects text contains '()(2)"' which appears to be an aura symbol followed by 2 inches, rendered as ()(2)" to preserve exact formatting
